message:
Add NTM alerting rules tests (bd-39ee)

Comprehensive test coverage for NTM alerting rules:
- ntm_health_degraded: Tests for degraded/unhealthy agent health states
- agent_stalled: Tests for RESTART/INVESTIGATE recommendation detection
- agent_terminated: Tests for removed agent detection
- ntm_rate_limited: Tests for rate limited agent alerts
- ntm_context_low: Tests for low context warning alerts

Also cleaned up alerts.ts to use exported NtmIsWorkingContext type
from model instead of local type alias.

35 tests, 184 assertions, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
